title: Cloudy Croatian Rice Stir-fry
description: A fluffy, airy rice dish packed with protein, veggies and a silky sweet rice flour glaze, inspired by monsoon skies of Croatia.
instructions: Rinse the rice until water runs clear, then soak it in cold water for 30 minutes.
Drain the rice, place it in a pot with 1.5 cups water, bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes until fluffy.
While the rice cooks, heat a wok over high heat and add 1 tbsp sesame oil.
Add the tofu cubes to the wok, stir-frying until golden on all sides, then remove and set aside.
In the same wok, add minced garlic and grated ginger, sauté for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Toss in carrot and snow peas, stir-frying for 2 minutes until crisp-tender.
Return the tofu to the wok, pour 2 tbsp soy sauce, and stir to coat evenly.
Sprinkle 1 tbsp sweet rice flour over the mixture, stirring quickly to create a light glaze, then add 1 cup cooked rice and mix thoroughly.
Sprinkle sliced green onion and toasted sesame seeds over the top, tossing gently to combine.
Serve hot, optionally drizzle with a splash of sesame oil for extra aroma.
